name: Quarterly Privileged Access Review
description: Review and recertify all privileged user accounts every quarter. Maintain audit trail of approvals and revocations.

name: Monthly Access Log Monitoring
description: Monitor and analyze system access logs on a monthly basis. Flag anomalous login patterns and unauthorized access attempts.

name: Role-Based Access Control (RBAC)
description: Maintain RBAC matrix for all systems. Provision access based on job function with manager approval. Quarterly attestation.

name: Annual Segregation of Duties Review
description: Review and validate segregation of duties across critical financial systems annually. Remediate conflicts within 30 days.

name: PII Data Encryption at Rest
description: Encrypt all personally identifiable information (PII) at rest using AES-256. Key rotation every 90 days.

name: Data Loss Prevention Monitoring
description: Deploy DLP controls on email and web gateway. Monitor and block unauthorized transmission of sensitive data.

name: Privacy Impact Assessment
description: Conduct PIA for any new system or process handling personal data before go-live. Review existing PIAs annually.

name: Data Retention and Disposal
description: Maintain data retention schedule. Dispose of data beyond retention period securely. Quarterly audit of disposal logs.

name: Quarterly Regulatory Reporting
description: Generate and submit regulatory reports to relevant authorities within mandated deadlines. Includes prudential, conduct, and statistical returns.

name: Incident Reporting to Regulator
description: Report material operational and compliance incidents to regulator within required timeframe (typically 24-72 hours depending on severity).

name: Monthly Management Information Pack
description: Prepare monthly compliance MI pack covering key risk indicators, breach log, regulatory updates, and control effectiveness metrics.

name: Monthly VaR Monitoring
description: Calculate and monitor daily Value at Risk (VaR) against approved limits. Escalate breaches within 24 hours.

name: Quarterly Risk Control Assessment
description: Assess design and operating effectiveness of key controls quarterly. Report findings to Risk Committee.

name: Stress Testing Framework
description: Conduct annual stress tests covering credit, market, and liquidity risk. Document assumptions and validate results.

name: New Product Approval Process
description: All new products and services require risk assessment and approval through NPAP before launch. Includes compliance, legal, and risk sign-off.

name: Customer Due Diligence (CDD)
description: Perform CDD on all new customers before onboarding. Enhanced due diligence for high-risk customers. Review annually.

name: Transaction Monitoring
description: Automated monitoring of customer transactions against AML typologies. Investigate and file SARs within mandated timeframe.

name: Sanctions Screening
description: Screen all customers and transactions against applicable sanctions lists. Zero tolerance for matches without license.

name: Vendor Risk Assessment
description: Assess all third-party vendors for security, compliance, and operational risk before engagement. Annual reassessment for critical vendors.

name: Third Party Due Diligence
description: Conduct financial, legal, and reputational due diligence on all material third parties before contracting. Quarterly monitoring of financial health.

name: Service Level Agreement Monitoring
description: Monitor and report on SLA adherence for all critical third-party services monthly. Escalate breaches to vendor management committee.

name: Business Continuity Plan Testing
description: Test BCP annually including failover of critical systems. Tabletop exercise for crisis management team quarterly.

name: IT Disaster Recovery Testing
description: Conduct full IT DR test annually covering all critical applications. Incremental tests for application changes quarterly.

name: Critical Service Mapping
description: Maintain and update mapping of critical business services to underlying people, processes, technology, and facilities. Review quarterly.

name: Staff Trading Surveillance
description: Monitor personal account dealing by staff. Automated alerts for pre-clearance violations and suspicious trading patterns. Review weekly.

name: Conflicts of Interest Register
description: Maintain firm-wide conflicts of interest register. Annual attestation by all senior managers. Review and update register quarterly.
